bullets: Developed large-scale ETL pipelines for extracting and processing e-commerce product data from 20+ online retailers across Saudi Arabia
Worked on data ingestion, cleaning, standardization, clustering, and product matching workflows using Python, Pandas, PostgreSQL, and MySQL
Developed a machine learning-assisted identifier extraction model to automatically detect GTINs, MPNs, and product identifiers from unstructured text
Built analytical dashboards and reporting solutions using Metabase and Power BI to analyze user behavior and product performance

entries.org: Data Management Office – University of Hafr Al-Batin
bullets: Designed and contributed to the development of a centralized Data Warehouse integrating academic, administrative, staff, and student data
Built and maintained ETL pipelines using SSIS, SQL Server, and Python for data extraction, transformation, cleaning, and loading processes
Integrated and processed data from Oracle and SQL Server databases across multiple university deanships and departments
Developed interactive Power BI dashboards and KPI reports for university management using drill-down analysis and data visualization techniques
Collaborated with university stakeholders and supervisors to automate reporting workflows and deliver actionable insights
